title: Unassign when status done - automation not working

posts.author: rachelilfm (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Have setup automation as follows (for both item status and sub-item status):

“When status changes to complete unassign person”

It works for me but not for shared users of the board (who are also owners) and so tasks are still showing up in their “My Work” space. Any help/suggestions much appreciated.

posts.author: shirozayas (Shiro Zayas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Rachel,

Your automation should look something like this:

Can you please confirm if this is the case? And if so, do you have any editing restriction to the people column?

posts.author: rachelilfm (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Shiro,

Thanks for your response.

Automation looks like this:

image.png1084×270 16.9 KB

and no restrictions on the person column that I can see:

Thanks,

posts.author: rachelilfm (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi again Shiro,

I think I’ve answered my own query. It looks like it was just Subitems that were affected because I’d selected Person rather than subitem owner. I’ve updated the automation and it seems to work now as expected.

Thanks for your support.

Best wishes,

posts.author: abbeydanskin (Abbey Danskin)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Shiro, I’m trying to find this automation to use, but it’s not coming up for me. Do you know why that might be? I am working from a non-profit plan if that’s relevant.
